name: Jordan Kauflin
title: Worship Leader & Songwriter
tagline: Church-centered songwriter serving congregational worship in the Sovereign Grace orbit
bio: Jordan Kauflin is a contemporary worship leader and songwriter associated with Sovereign Grace Music and church-centered congregational song ministry. His work belongs to a stream of modern evangelical worship writing focused on songs for gathered church singing rather than performance-driven Christian entertainment. He is part of the same broad ministry ecosystem that has shaped a number of modern congregational songs used in Reformed and complementarian evangelical churches.
faith: Kauflin’s public ministry is explicitly tied to church worship, congregational song, and theologically serious evangelical ministry. He fits the same basic ministry lane as other modern worship leaders and writers already represented in SDG’s congregational-music cluster. That makes him a reasonable inclusion as a contemporary songwriter serving the worship of the church.

sources.title: Sovereign Grace Music — Jordan Kauflin
sources.note: Artist / ministry profile within Sovereign Grace Music
